Workflow automerge policy belongs in project governance unless a human first adds it to the roadmap.","findings":[{"file":".github/workflows/review.yml","line":59,"issue":"The PR only enables automerge for the review workflow, which does not advance a roadmap target or a proximate prerequisite for one.","fix":"Block until a human adds this automation/governance change to the roadmap, or move it outside the roadmap-gated Tau Ceti PR stream.","evidence":"Diff adds only `enable_automerge: true` under the review workflow call; no roadmap node or mathematical target is identified in the provided PR material."}]}

verdict_obj.summary: This PR is a single workflow-configuration change, but it has no shown path to a Tau Ceti roadmap target or proximate prerequisite. Workflow automerge policy belongs in project governance unless a human first adds it to the roadmap.

findings.issue: The PR only enables automerge for the review workflow, which does not advance a roadmap target or a proximate prerequisite for one.
findings.fix: Block until a human adds this automation/governance change to the roadmap, or move it outside the roadmap-gated Tau Ceti PR stream.
findings.evidence: Diff adds only `enable_automerge: true` under the review workflow call; no roadmap node or mathematical target is identified in the provided PR material.
